channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: President Trump met with Chinese President Xi Jingping for summit during first day in the country, what Asia thinks of Trump's visit, appeals court he...

item.title: Ex-DOJ official goes public with blistering criticism of his former bosses
item.description: Until recently, Jonathan Gross was a Trump political appointee at the Department of Justice and worked on its "Weaponization Working Group." He has no...

item.title: The MAHA movement is coming to school cafeterias. Here's what that means for kids
item.description: U.S. school districts worry it could get even more expensive to prepare a meal under new federal dietary guidelines, as they also contend with cuts to...

item.title: Voters find themselves caught in the middle as redistricting battle escalates
item.description: Much of the redistricting war focuses on which party wins, but voters bear the real cost, according to observers.
